---
name: Feature
about: A new user-visible capability — new surface, new flow, new endpoint
title: 'feat(<scope>): <5-12 word descriptive phrase>'
labels: type/feature
---

<!--
Per dynolabs-io/workflow BACKLOG-STANDARDS:
- Title MUST start with `feat:` or `feat(<scope>):`.
- Body MUST contain the four sections below.
- Issue MUST fit ≤1 day of focused work. If bigger → file as EPIC instead.
- Apply ONE `status/*` label when claimed (none = unclaimed backlog).
-->

## Problem

<1-3 sentences: what's broken, missing, or wanted. STATE OF THE WORLD, not the fix.>

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] <operator-OBSERVABLE outcome — a screenshot, a curl response, a GitHub state transition, a deployment artifact>
- [ ] <another observable outcome>
- [ ] Screenshot of the walking-the-surface attached as a comment

## Out of scope

- <what this issue explicitly will NOT address>
- Use "follow-up: #N" when known

## Repos touched

- iogrid/iogrid (or list multiple if cross-repo)
